summary: Code review and partial UI testing of TRUCKERS NAV BY TUE app iteration 86. Verified implementation of: 1) Driver Profile feature with all 6 form fields and localStorage persistence, 2) Truck Profile modal with string-based inputs (fixing '0' bug), RECOMMENDED defaults, and Reset Defaults button, 3) Gold #D4AF37 theme in lane guidance and route comparison panel, 4) No CSS filter classes (sepia/invert/grayscale/hue-rotate) in components. UI testing was limited due to session persistence issues with guest login - app kept resetting to login screen between test steps.

minor.issue: fuelConsumption return parameter invalid - API returns 400 error. Non-blocking for core navigation.
API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis. Non-blocking.

integration_issues.issue: Session not persisting between Playwright test steps - app resets to login screen. May be browser automation specific, not affecting real users.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: DriverProfileModal.tsx - NEW FILE with 6 form fields (firstName, lastName, phone, email, licenseNumber, licenseExpiry), all with data-testid attributes
VERIFIED: DriverProfileModal has data-testid='driver-profile-modal' on modal container
VERIFIED: DriverProfileModal inputs: driver-first-name, driver-last-name, driver-phone, driver-email, driver-license-number, driver-license-expiry
VERIFIED: DriverProfileModal save button has data-testid='driver-profile-save'
VERIFIED: TruckProfileModal.tsx - REWRITTEN with string state for numeric fields (lines 41-59) to fix '0' display bug
VERIFIED: TruckProfileModal RECOMMENDED defaults object (lines 28-37): height=13.5ft, weight=78500lbs, length=53ft, width=8.5ft
VERIFIED: TruckProfileModal Reset Defaults button with data-testid='truck-reset-defaults' (line 228)
VERIFIED: TruckProfileModal placeholders show RECOMMENDED defaults (lines 140, 144, 148, 152)
VERIFIED: SettingsView.tsx - Driver Profile section (lines 502-547) with ProfileField components for Name, Phone, Email, CDL Number, License Expires
VERIFIED: SettingsView.tsx - Edit Driver Profile button with data-testid='edit-driver-profile-btn' (line 540)
VERIFIED: SettingsView.tsx - Driver profile persisted in localStorage key 'trucker_driver_profile' (lines 280-291)
VERIFIED: SettingsView.tsx - DriverProfileModal imported (line 27) and rendered (lines 673-678)
VERIFIED: NavigationHUD.tsx - LaneArrow uses gold #D4AF37 for active lanes (line 162), NOT blue #4285F4
VERIFIED: NavigationHUD.tsx - LaneRibbon uses gold theme (lines 216-233): border-[#D4AF37]/10, bg-[#D4AF37]/15, ring-[#D4AF37]/40
VERIFIED: RouteComparisonPanel.tsx - Gold/black theme: bg-black/95 (line 45), border-[#D4AF37]/20, gold title italic (line 49)
VERIFIED: RouteComparisonPanel.tsx - Selected card uses gold: bg-[#D4AF37]/10, border-[#D4AF37]/60 (line 81)
VERIFIED: No CSS filter classes (sepia, invert, grayscale, hue-rotate) found in component files

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Code review verified all features implemented correctly. UI testing limited by session persistence issue.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified via code review: 1) DriverProfileModal.tsx is a new file with 6 form fields and proper data-testid attributes, 2) TruckProfileModal.tsx uses string state for numeric inputs to fix '0' bug, has RECOMMENDED defaults and Reset Defaults button, 3) SettingsView.tsx has Driver Profile section with ProfileField components and localStorage persistence, 4) NavigationHUD.tsx uses gold #D4AF37 for lane guidance (not blue), 5) RouteComparisonPanel.tsx uses gold/black theme. No CSS filter classes found. Guest login works but Playwright session doesn't persist between test steps - may need to use persistent browser context for full E2E testing.

driver_profile_modal.details: DriverProfileModal.tsx has all 6 fields (firstName, lastName, phone, email, licenseNumber, licenseExpiry) with data-testid attributes. Modal has data-testid='driver-profile-modal'. Save button has data-testid='driver-profile-save'.

driver_profile_in_settings.details: SettingsView.tsx lines 502-547 show Driver Profile section with ProfileField components for Name, Phone, Email, CDL Number, License Expires. Edit button has data-testid='edit-driver-profile-btn'.

driver_profile_localstorage.details: SettingsView.tsx lines 280-291 show localStorage persistence with key 'trucker_driver_profile'. Profile loaded on mount and saved via saveDriverProfile function.

truck_profile_string_inputs.details: TruckProfileModal.tsx lines 41-59 use string state for numeric fields. Empty string shown when field is cleared (not '0'). Placeholders show RECOMMENDED defaults.

truck_profile_reset_defaults.details: TruckProfileModal.tsx line 228 has Reset Defaults button with data-testid='truck-reset-defaults'. resetDefaults function (lines 86-97) sets fields to RECOMMENDED values.

truck_profile_recommended_defaults.details: RECOMMENDED object (lines 28-37): height=13.5ft, weight=78500lbs, length=53ft, width=8.5ft, axleCount=5, axleWeight=12000, trailerCount=1.

lane_guidance_gold_theme.details: NavigationHUD.tsx line 162: active lane color is '#D4AF37' (gold), not '#4285F4' (blue). LaneRibbon uses gold theme throughout.

route_comparison_gold_black_theme.details: RouteComparisonPanel.tsx: bg-black/95 (line 45), border-[#D4AF37]/20, gold title italic (line 49), selected card bg-[#D4AF37]/10 (line 81).

no_css_filter_classes.details: grep search found no sepia, invert, grayscale, or hue-rotate CSS filter classes in component files. Only unrelated 'invert' comment in NavigationView.tsx.

guest_login.details: Guest login button visible and clickable. App loads to COMMAND CENTER dashboard with tutorial overlay. Session persistence issue in Playwright testing only.

known_issues.here_api_fuelconsumption: HERE API returns 400 error for fuelConsumption return parameter - may need to remove from API call
known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis
known_issues.playwright_session: Guest login session doesn't persist between Playwright test steps - app resets to login screen. May be browser automation specific.

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live
